raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is free space to the right/front-right of the cup so it can be slid away without colliding with box_2 or falling off the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is moved to the right/front-right, creating a clear approach corridor to the front face of box_1 and reducing collision risk during the box pickup."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of box_2 is reachable and there is free table space to the right of box_2; box_2 can be slid without snagging despite being attached_to box_1 (expect some coupled motion).",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted slightly to the right, increasing lateral clearance around box_1 for a safer two-arm grasp."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right side faces of box_1 with sufficient clearance from box_2 after the push; the grasp is planned as a pinch/hold on the box sides suitable for an oversized object (30 cm).",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (dark brown) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted/controlled off the tabletop (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is free space to the right/front-right of the cup so it can be slid away without colliding with box_2 or falling off the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is moved to the right/front-right, creating a clear approach corridor to the front face of box_1 and reducing collision risk during the box pickup.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of box_2 is reachable and there is free table space to the right of box_2; box_2 can be slid without snagging despite being attached_to box_1 (expect some coupled motion).
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted slightly to the right, increasing lateral clearance around box_1 for a safer two-arm grasp.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have unobstructed access to the left and right side faces of box_1 with sufficient clearance from box_2 after the push; the grasp is planned as a pinch/hold on the box sides suitable for an oversized object (30 cm).
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (dark brown) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted/controlled off the tabletop (picked up).
